title: Garden Route Badgers announces squad for next season
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS -On Tuesday, SWD Cricket revealed the professional squad for the 2025/26 season.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS -On Tuesday, SWD Cricket revealed the professional squad for the 2025/26 season."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Garden Route Badgers had a disappointing 2024/25 season and has appointed Letlotli Sesele as the new head coach for the upcoming season."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The significant change is in the bowling department with exciting new blood that has been recruited. The biggest loss to the squad is the departure of the match-winning wrist spinner, Thomas Kaber, to the Warriors - a division one franchise. Kelly Smuts and Keenan Vieira has retired from cricket.","html":"The significant change is in the bowling department with exciting new blood that has been recruited. The biggest loss to the squad is the departure of the match-winning wrist spinner, Thomas Kaber, to the Warriors - a division one franchise. Kelly Smuts and Keenan Vieira has retired from cricket."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Badgers has contracted the former SA U19 and Warriors spin-bowler, Liam Alder, as a replacement for Kaber. They also raised some eyebrows in obtaining the services of the 2024 SA Schools and SA U19 captain and wicketkeeper/batsman, Beni Hansen, from Western Province.","html":"The Badgers has contracted the former SA U19 and Warriors spin-bowler, Liam Alder, as a replacement for Kaber. They also raised some eyebrows in obtaining the services of the 2024 SA Schools and SA U19 captain and wicketkeeper/batsman, Beni Hansen, from Western Province."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Other new recruits in the bowling department include:","html":"Other new recruits in the bowling department include:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Banele Cele (from the Dolphins),","html":"Banele Cele (from the Dolphins),"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mondle Khumalo (former SA U19 player from the Tuskers)","html":"Mondle Khumalo (former SA U19 player from the Tuskers)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Zack Momberg, (from the Lions) who like Alder, matriculated at King Edward VII in Johannesburg.","html":"Zack Momberg, (from the Lions) who like Alder, matriculated at King Edward VII in Johannesburg."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The good news is that they retained several key performers:","html":"The good news is that they retained several key performers:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George van Heerden, who was their top run score the past season across all formats, and who is currently on tour as captain of the SA Emerging team in Bangladesh.","html":"George van Heerden, who was their top run score the past season across all formats, and who is currently on tour as captain of the SA Emerging team in Bangladesh."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Luke Beaufort, the aggressive wicketkeeper/batsman, has signed for another season.","html":"Luke Beaufort, the aggressive wicketkeeper/batsman, has signed for another season."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pheko Moletsane, who had a very good season in 2024/25 has also been retained.","html":"Pheko Moletsane, who had a very good season in 2024/25 has also been retained."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Top-order batsmen, Yaseen Valli, Ruan Terblanche and Kyle Jacobs, will serve the second year of their two-year contracts with the Badgers.","html":"Top-order batsmen, Yaseen Valli, Ruan Terblanche and Kyle Jacobs, will serve the second year of their two-year contracts with the Badgers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In his response, the new head coach Lotle Sesele, said, \"I am excited with the contracted squad.","html":"In his response, the new head coach Lotle Sesele, said, \"I am excited with the contracted squad."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We will look to improve and give a proper account of ourselves and we would like to do so in every competition.\"","html":"\"We will look to improve and give a proper account of ourselves and we would like to do so in every competition.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We have confidence in the squad assembled for the forthcoming season,\" said SWD CEO Albertus Kennedy.","html":"\"We have confidence in the squad assembled for the forthcoming season,\" said SWD CEO Albertus Kennedy."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We trust to improve on key areas that required strengthening to reach our objectives,\" Kennedy commented.","html":"\"We trust to improve on key areas that required strengthening to reach our objectives,\" Kennedy commented."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Six Gun Grill SWD Contracts for 2025/26","html":"Six Gun Grill SWD Contracts for 2025/26"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Liam Alder, Luke Beaufort, Banele Cele, Benni Hansen, Kyle Jacobs, Mondli Khumalo, Pheko Moletsane, Zack Momberg, Ruan Terblanche, Yaseen Valli and George van Heerden.","html":"Liam Alder, Luke Beaufort, Banele Cele, Benni Hansen, Kyle Jacobs, Mondli Khumalo, Pheko Moletsane, Zack Momberg, Ruan Terblanche, Yaseen Valli and George van Heerden."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"High-performance contracts","html":"High-performance contracts"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tyrece Karelse, Sintu Majiza, Liyabona Malife and Heath Richards.","html":"Tyrece Karelse, Sintu Majiza, Liyabona Malife and Heath Richards."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Garden Route Badgers announces squad for next season
